title: YOS BUS Packet Schema
description: Universal schema for all BUS packets — tasks, artifacts, decisions, MPM packets, MPR pointers, events.

bus_packet_id.description: Unique identifier for this BUS packet. Format: BUS-{YYYYMMDD}-{DOMAIN}-{SLUG}

domain.description: BUS domain this packet belongs to.

status.description: Current lifecycle stage of this packet.

created_by.description: Agent or system that created this packet.

claimed_by.description: Agent that claimed this packet from inbox. Null if unclaimed.

claimed_at.description: Timestamp when packet was claimed. Null if unclaimed.

payload.description: Packet payload. May be inline content or a pointer.

risk_flags.description: Risk flags requiring human review before execution.

canonicalization_target.description: Target path in YOS Git for durable canonicalization. Null if not yet canonicalized.
